CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Record Type names for which NPPatch should NOT automatically create Payment records. Opportunities with these Record Types will not trigger automatic Payment creation, even when Automatic Payment Creation is enabled. Common exclusions include Grant, In-Kind, and Membership Record Types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Record Types excluded from automatic Payment creation. Enter Record Type names separated by semicolons.
CustomField.label: Excluded Opp Record Types
